description.p: Stellar is a cross-platform download manager written in Qt6/C++ featuring segmented (multi-connection) transfers, resume support, browser integration via native messaging (Chrome and Firefox), a category-based download queue, scheduler, speed limiter, and Google Drive support.

ul.li: Queue and Scheduler system with one-time, daily, and periodic schedule types
Download Complete dialog with native drag-and-drop file export
Google Drive support with auth cookie pass-through
Browser extension for Chrome and Firefox with cookie capture
